---
title: "Preparing External Data"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Data Formatting Requirements}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

# Data Requirements (test test test)

To use `acciddasuite`, your data must follow the specific schema outlined below.

```{r, echo=FALSE}
DiagrammeR::mermaid("
graph TB
    A['External Data Source'] --> B{'Format Check'}
    B -->|'Valid'| C['Proceed to get_data()']
    B -->|'Invalid'| D['Apply acciddasuite Transformers']
")
